vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-45829
vulnerability.description: ChromaDB Python project has a pre-authentication code injection vulnerability.

statements.impact_statement: ChromaDB runs only as an internal service on the compose network (mcp / agent-api / frontend); its port is never published to the host and egress is further constrained by the default-deny tinyproxy allowlist shipped in the S4 hardening. The pre-authentication vector requires an adversary to reach the ChromaDB HTTP endpoint directly, which no untrusted principal can do in this deployment. No patched chromadb release exists (the advisory range is >= 1.0.0 <= 1.5.9); this statement is revisited when a fixed version ships.
